rules: No politics, hate speech, gender war, or personal attacks in any market
Data decisions must be backed by measured signals, never guesses
Never expose user PII in logs, analytics, or shared state
Core engine (feed, Question OS, scoring) changes require review-agent approval
Constitution policies cannot be changed by any agent
Each market's question pool, DNA copy, and storage are fully isolated
Approved candidates are filtered by locale before merging into feed
Quality score below 30 with 10+ votes triggers archive consideration
Skip rate above 40% flags a question for review
New features require npm run lint + npm run build passing before deploy
Operating policy changes require review-agent verdict of 'pass'
Research batch size: 3-4 per market per run
Question evaluation threshold: both options must be defensible
Cron metrics update frequency: every 6 hours
Feed sort: qualityScore desc within each status tier
